name: Small Parts Organizer 18 Drawers - Brightroom™
description:
Never worry about losing mechanical parts or small craft essentials again with the help of this 18-Drawer Small Parts Organizer from Brightroom™. This plastic organizer helps maximize vertical storage and features 18 drawers that come in handy for storing screws, bolts, nuts, hinges and springs as well as pins, buttons, googly eyes and more. Easy to pull out, each drawer features a transparent design that makes it easy to view the contents without having to open the drawers, while the compact size makes it great for stashing over a table or on any shelf.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
